title: Sub-workflow finishes immediately when not waiting for completion
symptom: When disabling 'Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion', the sub-workflow is triggered but finishes immediately without executing its tasks.
not_this_if: Sub-workflow runs correctly when 'Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion' is enabled
root_cause: Disabling the 'Wait For Sub-Workflow Completion' option may lead to the main workflow not properly handling the execution context of the sub-workflow, causing it to finish without executing its intended tasks.
fix_steps: Use a Webhook node to trigger the sub-workflow
Ensure the sub-workflow is set to active
From the main workflow, use an HTTP Request node to call the sub-workflow's webhook URL
Enable 'Respond Immediately' in the sub-workflow's Webhook node
agent_instruction: Set up a Webhook node to trigger the sub-workflow and ensure it responds immediately.
